title: Golden default GUI texturepack
description: The standard Minecraft textures, but with a golden theme.
body:
🏆 Golden Texture Pack 🏆

👑 --> Give your world a luxurious touch! This texture pack focuses on a shiny golden style to create a clean and elegant look.

Only the GUI has been changed – not everything is modified, but enough to give it a distinct golden feel. 

🟡 See the gallery for examples 🟡

-  Golden-themed GUI 
-  Clean and simple design

Make your world a little more golden 💛
